zh.Sedgley, West Midlands, England, United: 英國英格蘭韋斯特 米德藍茲瑟格利
zh.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Miles I是Francis Myles和Alice的兒子，於1463年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾瑟格利。他於大約1482年與Matilda Alice Flanders在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1541年4月18日在英國英格蘭韋斯特 米德藍茲瑟格利享年78歲。

nameMeanings.name: Miles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Mile + genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s, or from its other Old French form Miles, a derivative of ancient Germanic Milo, based on the element mil, from mel ‘good, generous’. The Old French oblique case form was Milon (see Milon 1). Compare Millen and Millson .

English: variant, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s, of Myhill , from a vernacular form of the Biblical name Michael . Miles Coverdale, the translator of the Bible, when in Germany, called himself Michael Anglus (‘the Englishman’).
Irish (Louth and Kilkenny): when not the same as 1 or 2, it is sometimes an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maolmhuire, see Myles .

variants.name: Milon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Pascal, Stephane.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the oblique case form of the Old French personal name Miles, a derivative of ancient Germanic Milo, based on the element mil, from mel ‘good, generous’.
French: from a shortened pet form of the personal name Émile (see Emile ).

variants.name: Millet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Leonce, Aime, Aubert, Celine, Herve, Julien, Leandre, Marcel, Monique, Patrice, Raymonde, Roussel.

French and Catalan: metonymic occupational name for a grower or seller of millet or panic grass, or a topographic name for someone who lived by a field of millet, from French and Catalan millet (from Latin milietum, a derivative of milium, in Old French mil ‘millet’).
French: habitational name from (Le) Millet, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Melson
meanings: patronymic from the Middle English male personal name Mile, Miles (see Miles ) or metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mill (see Mill 2) + -son.
perhaps occasionally a metronymic from a Middle English survival of the Old English female personal name Milde (‘mild, meek, gentle’) + -son.

variants.name: Mullery
meanings: Irish (Galway and Wicklow): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maolmhuire ‘descendant of Maolmhuire’, a personal name meaning ‘devotee of (the Virgin) Mary’. Compare Miles , Myles , Moyles .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Miles I was born in 1463, in Sedgley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Francis Myles and Alice. He married Matilda Alice Flanders about 1482, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 18 April 1541, in Sedgley, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

Il a épousé Matilda Alice Flanders environ 1482, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 18 avril 1541, à Sedgley, West Midlands, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Miles I(은)는 1463년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 세지리에서 Francis Myles(와)과 Alice의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1482년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Matilda Alice Flanders(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1541년 4월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 세지리에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Miles I родился в 1463 г. в местности седжли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Francis Myles и Alice. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Alice Flanders около 1482 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 18 апреля 1541 г. в местности седжли, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.
